languages.text: "Ага, ага, Хаос-шмяос. Только ты, подруженька, за Теодорой как утенок за мамой-уткой ходила, пока летала с нами на корабле. Она тебя спасла, помогла, а стоило тебе услыхать что-то ее порочащее — все, любовь прошла, осыпались цветочки. Ты не удивилась, не расстроилась — просто поставила крест на ее памяти и все".

traits.locale_text: "Ага, ага, Хаос-шмяос. Только ты, подруженька, за Теодорой как утенок за мамой-уткой ходила, пока летала с нами на корабле. Она тебя спасла, помогла, а стоило тебе услыхать что-то ее порочащее — все, любовь прошла, осыпались цветочки. Ты не удивилась, не расстроилась — просто поставила крест на ее памяти и все".
traits.speaker: IdiraCompanion

languages.text: "Yes, yes, Chaos, shmaos. Except I remember you following Theodora like a baby duck following its mother, dear friend. You didn't leave her side even for a moment while you were aboard the ship. She rescued you, aided you, and your adoration wilted the moment you heard an accusation that sullied her memory. You weren't surprised or upset — you just gave up on her and moved on."
languages.original_text: "Ага, ага, Хаос-шмяос. Только ты, подруженька, за Теодорой как утенок за мамой-уткой ходила, пока летала с нами на корабле. Она тебя спасла, помогла, а стоило тебе услыхать что-то ее порочащее — все, любовь прошла, осыпались цветочки. Ты не удивилась, не расстроилась — просто поставила крест на ее памяти и все".

You haven't left her side even for a moment while you were aboard the ship. She rescued you, aided you, and your adoration wilted the moment you heard an accusation that smeared her memory. You were neither surprised nor upset, you just gave up on her and moved on."

You didn't leave her side even for a moment while you were aboard the ship. She rescued you, aided you, and your adoration wilted the moment you heard an accusation that sullied her memory. You weren't surprised or upset — you just gave up on her and moved on."

languages.text: "Ja, ja, Chaos, Schmaos. Nur erinnere ich mich, dass du Theodora gefolgt bist wie ein Entenbaby seiner Mutter, lieber Freund. Du bist ihr nicht einen Moment von der Seite gewichen, als du an Bord des Schiffes warst. Sie hat dich gerettet, dir geholfen, und deine Verehrung erlosch in dem Moment, als du eine Anschuldigung hörtest, die ihr Andenken beschmutzte. Du warst nicht überrascht oder verärgert — du hast sie einfach aufgegeben und bist weitergezogen."
languages.original_text: "Yes, yes, Chaos, shmaos. Except I remember you following Theodora like a baby duck following its mother, dear friend. You didn't leave her side even for a moment while you were aboard the ship. She rescued you, aided you, and your adoration wilted the moment you heard an accusation that sullied her memory. You weren't surprised or upset — you just gave up on her and moved on."

traits.locale_text: "Ja, ja, Chaos, Schmaos. Nur erinnere ich mich, dass du Theodora gefolgt bist wie ein Entenbaby seiner Mutter, lieber Freund. Du bist ihr nicht einen Moment von der Seite gewichen, als du an Bord des Schiffes warst. Sie hat dich gerettet, dir geholfen, und deine Verehrung erlosch in dem Moment, als du eine Anschuldigung hörtest, die ihr Andenken beschmutzte. Du warst nicht überrascht oder verärgert — du hast sie einfach aufgegeben und bist weitergezogen."

languages.text: "Oui, oui, Chaos, shmaos. Mais je me souviens que tu as suivi Théodora comme un canard qui suit sa mère, cher ami. Tu ne l'as pas quittée un seul instant pendant que tu étais à bord du navire. Elle t'a secouru, aidé, et ton adoration s'est évanouie dès que tu as entendu une accusation qui a sali sa mémoire. Tu n'as été ni surpris ni bouleversé, tu as simplement renoncé à elle et tu es passé à autre chose".
languages.original_text: "Yes, yes, Chaos, shmaos. Except I remember you following Theodora like a baby duck following its mother, dear friend. You didn't leave her side even for a moment while you were aboard the ship. She rescued you, aided you, and your adoration wilted the moment you heard an accusation that sullied her memory. You weren't surprised or upset — you just gave up on her and moved on."

traits.locale_text: "Oui, oui, Chaos, shmaos. Mais je me souviens que tu as suivi Théodora comme un canard qui suit sa mère, cher ami. Tu ne l'as pas quittée un seul instant pendant que tu étais à bord du navire. Elle t'a secouru, aidé, et ton adoration s'est évanouie dès que tu as entendu une accusation qui a sali sa mémoire. Tu n'as été ni surpris ni bouleversé, tu as simplement renoncé à elle et tu es passé à autre chose".

languages.text: "Sí, sí, Caos, shmaos. Excepto que te recuerdo siguiendo a Theodora como un pato bebé sigue a su madre, querido amigo. No te separaste de ella ni un momento mientras estuviste a bordo de la nave. Ella te rescató, te ayudó, y tu adoración se marchitó en cuanto oíste una acusación que mancillaba su memoria. No te sorprendiste ni te disgustaste, simplemente la abandonaste y seguiste adelante".
languages.original_text: "Yes, yes, Chaos, shmaos. Except I remember you following Theodora like a baby duck following its mother, dear friend. You didn't leave her side even for a moment while you were aboard the ship. She rescued you, aided you, and your adoration wilted the moment you heard an accusation that sullied her memory. You weren't surprised or upset — you just gave up on her and moved on."

traits.locale_text: "Sí, sí, Caos, shmaos. Excepto que te recuerdo siguiendo a Theodora como un pato bebé sigue a su madre, querido amigo. No te separaste de ella ni un momento mientras estuviste a bordo de la nave. Ella te rescató, te ayudó, y tu adoración se marchitó en cuanto oíste una acusación que mancillaba su memoria. No te sorprendiste ni te disgustaste, simplemente la abandonaste y seguiste adelante".

languages.text: "Evet, evet, Chaos, shmaos. Ama ben senin Theodora'yı annesini takip eden yavru bir ördek gibi takip ettiğini hatırlıyorum, sevgili dostum. Gemideyken onun yanından bir an bile ayrılmadın. O seni kurtardı, sana yardım etti ve onun anısını lekeleyen bir suçlama duyduğun anda ona olan hayranlığın soldu. Şaşırmadın ya da üzülmedin — sadece ondan vazgeçtin ve yoluna devam ettin."
languages.original_text: "Yes, yes, Chaos, shmaos. Except I remember you following Theodora like a baby duck following its mother, dear friend. You didn't leave her side even for a moment while you were aboard the ship. She rescued you, aided you, and your adoration wilted the moment you heard an accusation that sullied her memory. You weren't surprised or upset — you just gave up on her and moved on."

Şaşırmadın ya da üzülmedin — sadece ondan vazgeçtin ve yoluna devam ettin."
